text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. It enables machines to interpret text, recognise meaning, and even respond like people. For example, NLP powers translation tools that convert sentences from one language to another. It also performs sentiment analysis, which detects emotions in written comments, such as whether a review is positive or negative. Another common use is chatbots, which can answer questions or solve problems in customer service. Thanks to NLP, machines are becoming better at understanding our words and making communication easier.
